title: SV Sound Block
description: Plugin that allows you to upload your own sounds to note blocks
body:
# `🎵` Simple Voice Chat Sound Block
Add **your own custom sounds** to note blocks using [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat).
The interface is implemented through the [Dialog API](https://docs.papermc.io/paper/dev/dialogs/).

---
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/J1Tbn3RsyzM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## `✨` Features

* `📀` Upload your own sounds and assign them to note blocks
* `🎹` Use different blocks for different effects
* `🧩` Supports .mp3 & .wav audio formats
---
